DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT TRAFTON AND DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT MARTINEZ MOTIONS TO COMPEL SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ AND SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1 -- TRUNG V. QUACH APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES TRAFTON AND MARTINEZ. FREDERICK C. ROESTI APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. AS THE RESPONSES WERE UNTIMELY, ALL OBJECTIONS WAIVED HAVE BEEN WAIVED. ANY RESERVATION OF THE RIGHT TO SUPPLEMENT PARTICULAR RESPONSES IS STRICKEN. A RESPONSE MUST BE COMPLETE AT THE TIME IT IS MADE. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO RESPOND IN A TIMELY MANNER AND MADE EVASIVE RESPONSES. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $636.30 WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS WILL BE STAYED IF THE CASE IS SETTLED WITHIN 14 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (610/BCHAN)
